average_speed_value: What is the average speed over the marked interval of the distance-time graph?
What integer average speed is shown over the marked interval?
Read the distance change and time interval on the d-t graph. What is the average speed?
For the highlighted interval, compute the integer average speed in m/s.
Using the marked distance-time segment, what average speed is shown?
speed_change_state_choice: On the marked interval of the velocity-time graph, which option describes how the object's speed changes?
Which option gives the speed-change state over the marked velocity-time interval?
Which candidate state matches the marked interval on the v-t graph?
For the highlighted interval, choose the option that describes whether the object speeds up, slows down, or keeps constant speed.
Read the marked velocity-time segment. Which option describes the speed state?
constant_velocity_interval_displacement: What is the displacement during the marked time interval?
Use the velocity-time graph. What integer displacement is shown over the highlighted interval?
Read the constant velocity segment and the marked time interval. What displacement does it represent?
For the marked interval on the v-t graph, what displacement is covered?
Using the visible velocity and interval width, determine the displacement over the marked interval.
constant_acceleration_interval_displacem: What is the displacement during the marked time interval?
Use the velocity-time graph. What integer displacement is shown over the highlighted interval?
Read the sloped velocity segment and the marked time interval. What displacement does it represent?
For the marked interval on the v-t graph, what displacement is covered?
Using the visible endpoint velocities and interval width, determine the displacement over the marked interval.

scene:motion_graph_diagram.object_description: a kinematics graph with labeled axes, a piecewise-linear curve, and one marked time interval

query:average_speed_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer average speed in m/s
query:average_speed_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the marked distance-time graph segment as [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], where each endpoint is a [x, y] pixel point

query:speed_change_state_choice.answer_hint: set "answer" to the option letter for the speed-change state shown by the marked velocity-time graph interval
query:speed_change_state_choice.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the marked velocity-time graph segment as [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], where each endpoint is a [x, y] pixel point

query:constant_velocity_interval_displac.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer displacement over the marked interval
query:constant_velocity_interval_displac.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the marked velocity-time graph segment as [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], where each endpoint is a [x, y] pixel point

query:constant_acceleration_interval_dis.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer displacement over the marked interval
query:constant_acceleration_interval_dis.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the marked velocity-time graph segment as [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], where each endpoint is a [x, y] pixel point
